prompt: Ultra-detailed wide street art mural painted on a rough, weathered concrete city wall with a dramatic split composition. On the left side, a vibrant tropical beach scene in warm pastel tones features a young man (same face as reference) relaxing on a beach chair, casually sipping from a fresh coconut under a glowing sunset sky, surrounded by palm trees and gentle ocean waves. The mood is calm and carefree, enhanced with playful tropical emojis and the caption ’healing’ integrated into the mural. On the right side, a dark, cluttered workspace in cold bluish-gray tones shows the same young man under stress, sitting at a messy desk filled with scattered papers, crumpled notes, a coffee mug, and dim lighting. A glowing laptop screen prominently displays ’DEADLINE 23:59,’ casting harsh light on his tired face, creating a late-night, high-pressure atmosphere. In the center, bold graffiti-style text reads ’OTHERS ARE HEALING’ and ’I AM ON A DEADLINE’ in dripping paint typography with strong contrast and layered spray textures. Beneath the text, include a stylized dragon logo with the tag ’JOHNN’ in graffiti signature style. Cinematic lighting, gritty textures, hyper-realistic mural finish, strong emotional contrast between relaxation and stress, urban street art aesthetic, 8K ultra-detailed resolution.
